case_title: DIAZ MIGUEL E. VS BALDIZON FERNANDO et al

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BALDIZON FERNANDO BALDIZON ANA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT DIAZ MIGUEL E. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIAZ MIGUEL E. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BALDIZON FERNANDO BALDIZON ANA $186.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $194.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,322.00 FILED BY BALDIZON FERNANDO BALDIZON ANA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT DIAZ MIGUEL E. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-15-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $586.00 FILED BY DIAZ MIGUEL E. AS TO DEFENDANT BALDIZON FERNANDO BALDIZON ANA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-15-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
